# Error Translator

> Translates cryptic error messages into emotional human language with 5 personas.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Web Audio API, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — Main application component
- src/components/ — UI components (persona selector, emotion meter, etc.)
- src/data/ — Error database (48 errors across 6 languages), persona definitions
- src/hooks/ — Custom React hooks
- src/utils/ — Utility functions

## Features
- 5 translator personas (Therapist, Drama Queen, Gen-Z, Shakespearean, Corporate)
- Emotion meter visualization
- Error Hall of Fame
- 48 errors across JavaScript, Python, Java, C++, Rust, Go
- Animated persona switching
- Shareable translation cards

## URLs
- Live: https://error-translator.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/error-translator
